train.prompt: Write a Playwright test for the user login flow
Set up Page Object Model for our Playwright test suite

I need to capture screenshots and video when browser tests fail
I want to make sure the entire checkout process works from start to finish in a real browser
Users report the signup flow breaks on mobile, I need to automate testing across viewports

Optimize the database index for the search query

val.prompt: Configure the test pipeline to run browser tests in parallel on CI

Build a caching layer using Redis for the API
